language.label: Language
lobby.title: Glass Bridge · Lobby
lobby.subtitle: Your nickname is shown to other players on the bridge in real time. (Spaces and special characters are shortened automatically.)
lobby.tip: Press Enter or the Join button to enter.
lobby.connectError: Could not connect to the game server. Try again later or use Solo Play. (Please check that the server is running.)
hint.tip: The correct glass panel on the next row lights up for 1 second and is also revealed to other players.
